name: claude-code-profile-switcher
description: A cross-platform desktop application to easily switch between different Claude Code profiles (API providers and models).

scripts.build: tsup src/main.ts src/preload.ts src/renderer.ts --format cjs --clean && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('src/index.html', 'dist/index.html'); require('fs').copyFileSync('src/styles.css', 'dist/styles.css')"
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run start

author: Baris Kisir
